prompt: High exposure out of position: choose fold.
why_v1: Fold protects chips when stack depth and price do not support continuing.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits because acting first with this much exposure makes weak continues too expensive once the depth edge is gone.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold is stronger here because high exposure out of position makes weak continues expensive once depth and price stop supporting leverage. Preserving chips matters more than defending a spot where you will have to act first without enough real edge.
